parameters.jsonBody:
={{ {
  isGroup: true,
  platform: $json.platform,
  contact: $json.contact || $json.final_contact,
  remoteJid: $json.platform === 'WhatsApp' ? $json.source_chat_id : ($json.source_chat_id + '@g.us'),
  city: $json.city,
  location: $json.city,
  budget: $json.budget,
  category: $json.category,
  text_es: ($json.text_es || '').replace(/cocina/gi, 'area de servicio'),
  title_es: $json.title_es,
  text_en: $json.text_en,
  title_en: $json.title_en,
  text_ru: $json.text_ru,
  title_ru: $json.title_ru,
  text_pt: $json.text_pt,
  title_pt: $json.title_pt
} }}

parameters.text:
=### WORLDMODELS QUALITY FILTER v24 (Optimized) ###
TEXT: "{{ $json.texto_limpio }}"

VALUABLE LEADS (category=evento or plaza):
- Client Booking Requests (EVENTO): "Who is available?", "Need model now", "Outcall for 1h", "Meeting ASAP", "Booking for tonight". These are the HIGHEST PRIORITY.
- Vacancies (PLAZA): Agencies/Clubs looking for girls to work, "Hiring now", "Busco chicas".
- Accommodation (PLAZA): Apartment/Room offers specifically for models/staff.
- Tours & Castings (EVENTO): "Tour in Madrid", "Casting for brand", "Event staff needed".

TRASH (category=trash, trash=true):
- Self-Promotion: Individual models saying "I am available", "Call me now", "Disponible", or promoting their own services.
- Explicit sexual services spam without a clear client request.
- Crypto, scams, personal greetings, generic "Hi".
- Any message where the sender is clearly the one offering the service rather than the one requesting/hiring.

CATEGORIES:
- "plaza": Vacancies, job offers, room/apartment offers for staff.
- "evento": CLIENT REQUESTS, direct leads, tours, castings, parties, ASAP calls.
- "trash": Self-promotion, spam, non-relevant content.

IF VALID, provide:
1. TITLE: Descriptive but short (max 5 words).
2. FULL translations: text_es, text_en, text_ru, text_pt.
3. CITY: Specific city if mentioned, otherwise "Global".
4. ECHO METADATA: platform, contact, source_chat_id.

JSON SCHEMA:
{
  "city": "City",
  "budget": "Value",
  "category": "plaza|evento|trash",
  "detected_lang": "ES|EN|RU|PT",
  "title_es": "...", "text_es": "...",
  "title_en": "...", "text_en": "...",
  "title_ru": "...", "text_ru": "...",
  "title_pt": "...", "text_pt": "...",
  "platform": "{{ $json.platform }}",
  "contact": "{{ $json.final_contact }}",
  "source_chat_id": "{{ $json.source_chat_id }}",
  "trash": boolean
}
